description:
Product Information:
Product category: foundation brush

Name: 7 off white makeup brushes
Brush hair / handle: fiber hair, pony hair / solid wood handle
Specification: 7 sets of brush + (brush barrel / Lace BRUSH BAG / bow bag)
Advantages: soft, no face pricking, no hair falling, strong powder catching power, buffering when touching skin, comfortable touch.
● the eye makeup brush is strictly selected from animal horse hair, which has good powder exposure and strong halo dyeing effect.

Applicable people: makeup beginners
Specifications: 7 beige sticks + brush bucket, 7 champagne sticks + brush bucket, 7 violet sticks + brush bucket, beige 7 sticks + bow brush bag, 7 champagne colors + bow brush bag, violet 7 sticks + bow brush bag
